qa_method.name: qa_detect.QADetector
qa_method.description: PCA-1 induced ordering over tabular rows; QADetector scores each row's E_QA = 1 - QCI under a calibrated cmap permutation.
qa_method.observer_projection: quantile binning of feature pairs -> (b,e) in {1..m}^2; variants differ in pairing rule (adjacent/MI/orbit-concentration)

calibration_provenance.procedure: quantile edges from training features; cmap permutation chosen by max-QCI over ~720 permutations on training transition triples (2026-04-13 fix — previously carried finance-tuned default)
calibration_provenance.domain_of_origin: per-benchmark (recalibrated, not inherited from finance cert [154])

diffs: no temporal window (tabular has no intrinsic order)
PCA-1 induced ordering instead of calendar time
cmap recalibrated per dataset instead of inherited
Mahalanobis proxy variant replaced by E_QA = 1 - QCI in variant A/C'

source_mapping.mapping_rationale: This benchmark exists specifically to prevent inherited calibration from being silently reused outside its source domain.

ablation.destroyed_structure: shuffle QA observer labels before computing AUROC
ablation.expected_direction: QADetector should lose any advantage over baselines when the QA state assignment is destroyed
